entry.title: IDC HT940214D0003 (P00030) awarded to WISCONSIN PHYSICIANS SERVICE INSURANCE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF A. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT THE FOLLOWING MANUAL CHANGES: TRICARE OPERATIONS MANUAL CHANGE 146, AND TRICARE SYSTEMS MANUAL CHANGE 75, TITLED NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF STANDARDS AND TECHNOLOGY, AND DATED JULY 9, 2015. ALSO, REPLACE CONTRACT DATA REQUIREMENT LIST A040-NIST CERTIFICATION OF COMPLIANCE, REMOVE NIST REDUNDANCIES, AND DEFINITIZE THE CHANGE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATION OF INSURANCE AND PENSION FUNDS
